reasoning: 1b487ea8a69.c L14: Same null pointer dereference as TRANSFORMATION_130 (scontext=NULL at L7, dereferenced at L14, // ERROR). Known VBDB bug. PC has !__USE_EXTERN_INLINES instead of __USE_EXTERN_INLINES (T130's variant), but same real conditions: ENABLE_SELINUX=T AND !ENABLE_FEATURE_STAT_FORMAT=T. The restrictive !_STDLIB_H over-constrains the PC — bug also manifests in normal compilation with _STDLIB_H=T. Known bug, PC over-constrained.
